title: Entity Identity
description: Immutable identity record for a system entity in the ontologia registry. Every entity (organ, repo, module, document, session) receives a permanent UID that survives renames, relocations, merges, and splits.

entity_type.description: The kind of entity this identity represents

lifecycle_status.description: Current lifecycle state of the entity

created_by.description: Identifier of the creator (user, agent, or system component)

metadata.description: Extensible metadata attached to the entity
